creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 253350
upgrade patch

This commit removes the dependency on genisoimage, so it could be handy. 

Port builds fine in poudriere-devel and runs without issues. CD9660 images are now made with makefs(8) from the base. A few cloud-init images were deployed to test this replacement, but let the audience do wider testing.
